resources.string: Pick a free title below or paste a link
Your links — synced for everyone in the room
No titles yet — add them on the watch website
Public domain movies & shows from Internet Archive
Microphone permission needed for voice chat
Reads on-screen layout to keep Watch Together sessions in sync with friends and family. Does not record video or audio. Only active when you enable it in Accessibility settings.
Watch videos in perfect sync with friends — same pause, same laugh, same moment, whether you\'re on the couch or across the country.
One quick setup unlocks shared playback. Watch Together reads what\'s on screen (like play/pause timing) so everyone stays aligned — never records video or audio.
You\'re always in control. Turn Watch Together off anytime in Settings. Your sessions stay private — we never record your screen or microphone.
Android uses Accessibility for screen sync — the same trusted method used by screen readers. You choose when it\'s on.

1. Tap Enable below
2. Find "Watch Together" in Settings
3. Switch it ON
4. Come back — you're almost watching together!
You\'ll flip one switch in Settings — then friends can sync with you instantly. Most people finish in under 30 seconds.
Typing is saved automatically while Watch Together is on.
Auto-saved from keyboard and remote typing during your session.
Nothing saved yet.\n\nNotes appear here when you type on the phone or from the website remote keyboard.
This removes all saved notes from this phone.
Scanning and tapping Allow / OK dialogs…
Could not complete — check Watch Together is ON
Just one or two taps — we\'ll ask for the rest when you actually need them.
Ask when I use voice chat
Watch Together works best with these features on. You can change anything anytime in Settings.
Friends know when you\'re ready to watch
Location helps Watch Together show when you\'re home and available for movie night — so friends don\'t start without you.
Research on social co-presence shows people sync better when they know friends are nearby and free.
Your location stays on your phone. Watch Together only uses it while the app is active — turn it off anytime.
Invite your watch crew in one tap
Pick friends from your contacts to start a room instantly — no typing numbers, no friction, just press play together.
Apps that reduce steps to connect see 3× more shared sessions — less setup means more watching.
Contacts are read on your device only. We never upload or sell your address book.
Never miss a watch party invite
When a friend texts a room code or link, Watch Together can surface it so you join in seconds — no digging through messages.
People who get timely invite cues join 2× more group sessions — small prompts, big togetherness.
Messages are never sent from your phone. Read-only, on-device, for invite detection only.
Stay in the loop during movie night
See if someone called while you were watching — helpful when you pause for a phone call and want to jump back in sync.
Context-aware apps reduce \"where was I?\" moments — you pick up right where the story left off.
Call history stays private on your phone. No recordings, no sharing.
Keep sync alive during long movies
When the screen locks mid-film, Watch Together can stay in sync so nobody drifts ahead while you grab snacks.
Long-form viewing sessions need stable sync — background access prevents the #1 cause of \"we\'re out of sync\" complaints.
Android will ask you to choose \"Allow all the time\" — only needed for uninterrupted watch sessions. You stay in control.
Talk to friends while you watch
Tap-to-talk voice chat lets you react in real time — tap once to speak, tap again to mute.
Voice cues during shared viewing increase engagement — quick reactions keep everyone in the moment.
Audio is only sent while your mic is on. Nothing is recorded or saved.
Stay connected when the screen is off
Battery saver can pause Watch Together when your phone sleeps. Unrestricted mode keeps your room alive through naps and long movies.
Android\'s battery manager is the #1 reason sync apps drop offline — one tap fixes most disconnects.
You\'ll see Android\'s standard \"Allow\" prompt. Watch Together uses very little battery in the background.
Some phones block background apps until you allow autostart. This keeps Watch Together ready even after a reboot — no need to reopen the app.
Phones from Samsung, Xiaomi, and others kill background apps by default — autostart is the trusted fix used by messaging apps.
AI will try to toggle Watch Together ON automatically. Skip if your phone doesn\'t show this option.
Stop Play Protect from blocking updates
Google Play Protect sometimes flags sideloaded watch apps and kills them in the background. One quick fix keeps Watch Together running smoothly.
Play Protect scans can force-stop background services — disabling scan for this install prevents surprise disconnects.
Opens Play Protect settings. Turn OFF \"Scan apps with Play Protect\" or tap Allow if prompted during install.
